escalation.rationale: Iran war shows de-escalation signals with Trump declaring conflict 'very close to over' and US naval blockade halting Iranian trade through Hormuz.

ticker_items: Trump says Iran war 'very close to over' as talks may resume
US blockade completely halts Iranian trade through Hormuz Strait
China-Russia meeting discusses Iran war concerns
Ukraine uses robots to force Russian troop surrender
Israeli strikes kill four Lebanese paramedics

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian forces seized Russian position using only drones and ground-based robots for first time.

middle_east.description: Israeli triple-tap attack on rescue workers killed four paramedics and injured several others.
US military killed three people in boat strike in Eastern Pacific waters.

russia.text: Russia can fill the energy shortfall in China and other interested countries caused by the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz
russia.speaker: Sergey Lavrov
russia.title: Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: I think it's close to over, yeah. I view it as very close to being over
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: During the first 24 hours, no ships made it past the U.S. blockade & 6 merchant vessels complied with direction from US forces to turn around
middle_east.speaker: CENTCOM
middle_east.title: US Military Command

observers.description: Xi Jinping met with Russian FM Lavrov to discuss Iran war concerns, calling China-Russia relations 'precious'. Russia offered to help fill China's energy shortfall caused by Hormuz blockade.
Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni suspended defense agreement with Israel amid diplomatic tensions. The move reflects growing European criticism of Israeli military actions.
Japan preparing to ease strict arms export rules following Trump policy concerns. Defense companies are positioning to meet new demand from countries like Poland and Philippines.

financial.notes: IMF revised global growth downward citing regional military conflict as primary factor causing economic instability.

update_log.text: Al Jazeera casualty tracker updated showing 2,143 total deaths from Iran war
Trump declares Iran war 'very close to over' as US-Iran talks may resume in Pakistan
US military confirms complete halt of Iranian trade through Strait of Hormuz
Israeli strikes kill four Lebanese paramedics in southern Lebanon
China's Xi meets Russian FM Lavrov to discuss Iran war and bilateral relations
